assertions.text: Correctly identifies system as high-risk under Annex III Area 4 (recruitment/candidate selection) via Art. 6(2)
assertions.evidence: Response correctly identifies 'Annex III, Section 4 (Employment AI)' as the applicable high-risk category covering CV filtering and candidate ranking

assertions.text: Lists at least 4 key provider obligations from Arts. 9-17 (e.g., risk management, data governance, human oversight, conformity assessment)
assertions.evidence: Response lists risk management, data governance, bias auditing, technical documentation, transparency, human oversight, accuracy/robustness, QMS — well over 4

assertions.text: States the 2 August 2026 compliance deadline for Annex III high-risk systems
assertions.evidence: Response explicitly states 'August 2, 2026. A Q1 2026 launch precedes enforcement'

assertions.text: Mentions CE marking (Art. 48) and EU AI database registration (Art. 49) requirements
assertions.evidence: Response mentions CE marking and EU database registration as required pre-market steps

assertions.text: Identifies the correct conformity assessment path: self-assessment (Annex VI) for Annex III Area 4 systems (Points 2-8)
assertions.evidence: Response states 'For employment AI systems, this is typically a self-assessment (you do not need a notified body, unlike some other high-risk categories)'
